Tuition 2025–26
Boarding
Day
$84,070
$59,790
Our financial aid program is designed to make a Webb education possible for all families based on demonstrated financial need.
Over $7 million in need-based financial aid is given each year
30% of Webb families receive financial aid
$69,000 = average boarding student financial award
$43,000 = average day student financial award
Contact
affordingwebb@webb.org
with questions or to learn more.
Financial Aid
Application Deadline for Fall 2026-27 Academic Year:
January 15, 2026
Step 1
Start your application at the
Clarity site
. Webb uses Clarity to securely collect your financial aid application and supporting documents.
Step 2
The application typically takes less than 30 minutes, and you can save your progress and return at any time.
If you need support while completing your application, there is in-app support at
support@claritytuition.com
in English and Spanish.

NOTICE OF NONDISCRIMINATORY POLICY AS TO STUDENTS.
The Webb School admits students of any race, color, national and ethnic origin to all the rights, privileges, programs, and activities generally accorded or made available to students at the school. It does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national and ethnic origin in administration of its educational policies, admissions policies, scholarship and loan programs, and athletic and other school-administered programs.
